text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Repeatedly creating/modifying the 'Internet Settings\\Connections' registry key and making frequent outbound connections to port 5985 (WinRM), which can be indicative of remote administration, proxy configuration, or malicious lateral movement.",
  "indicators": [
    "svchost.exe",
    "wmidcom.dll",
    "dpapi.dll",
    "HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings\\Connections",
    "5985",
    "WinRM",
    "remote management",
    "internet settings modification"
  ]
}
